description: SupportBot app dashboard — health, specialists, 16 use cases, outliers, prompt-injection, cost, model routing, cascades, live tail. Queries are namespace-agnostic; they target the llm-gateway sigil JSON event stream wherever it runs.

panels.title: 🏥 Health — is SupportBot up and meeting SLOs?

panels.description: Combined request rate across supportbot + all sb-* specialists (OTel span metrics, 5m window).
panels.title: How much traffic is hitting SupportBot? (req/s)

panels.description: Share of supportbot + sb-* spans marked STATUS_CODE_ERROR over all spans (5m). Yellow above 1%, red above 5%.
panels.title: ⚠ Are requests failing? (error rate)

panels.description: 95% of supportbot + sb-* requests finish in under this many seconds (OTel span metrics, 5m). Yellow above 1s, red above 3s.
panels.title: How slow is the slow tail? (p95 latency)

panels.description: Worst-case latency floor — 99% of supportbot + sb-* requests finish under this. Useful to see how bad the worst 1% looks.
panels.title: How bad is the worst 1%? (p99 latency)
📦 Specialists — which sb-* agents handle the traffic?

panels.description: Input tokens/min per sb-* specialist over time (gen_ai_client_token_usage). Filtered by the Specialist dropdown. One line per agent shows the live mix.

targets.expr: sum by (ai_o11y_specialist) (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", ai_o11y_specialist=~"$specialist", gen_ai_token_type="input", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[5m])) * 60

panels.title: Which specialist is taking the load? (input tokens/min)

panels.description: Donut split of input-token volume across sb-* specialists over the last hour. Quick view of who carries most of the work right now.
panels.title: What share of traffic per specialist?
📊 Use case mix — which scenarios are firing right now?

panels.description: Input tokens/min broken down by ai_o11y_usecase. Each named scenario from registry/use_cases gets a line, so you can see, e.g., data-theft-tim ramping up live.

targets.expr: sum by (ai_o11y_usecase) (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", ai_o11y_usecase=~"$use_case", gen_ai_token_type="input", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[5m])) * 60

panels.title: Which use cases are active? (tokens/min by use_case)

panels.description: Total input tokens consumed by each use case over the last hour, sorted descending. Tall bars = scenarios currently dominating SupportBot traffic.
panels.title: 🔥 Top use cases by token volume
🚫 Bad question askers — who's getting refused or escalated?

panels.description: Per-persona ratio: tokens going to sb-escalator divided by all sb-* tokens (15m window). A high % means SupportBot keeps handing this user off to a human — yellow above 10%, red above 30%.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist="sb-escalator", user_id=~".*@.*", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[15m])) / (sum by (user_id) (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", user_id=~".*@.*", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[15m])) + 0.001))

panels.title: 👤 Who is getting escalated to humans? (top 10, 15m)

panels.description: Per-persona ratio: tokens going to sb-security-handler (denials, lockdowns) divided by all sb-* tokens (15m). High % is an insider-threat early warning — yellow above 20%, red above 40%.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist="sb-security-handler", user_id=~".*@.*", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[15m])) / (sum by (user_id) (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", user_id=~".*@.*", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[15m])) + 0.001))

panels.title: 🛡 Who is hitting the security handler? (top 10, 15m)
👤 Outlier users — Tim, Eric and other heavy hitters

panels.description: Per-persona token total over the last hour, sorted descending. tim.lin@acme.com (data-theft-tim) and eric.bader@acme.com (prompt-injection) should sit at the top during the demo.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", user_id=~".*@.*", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[1h])))

panels.title: 🔥 Top spenders by tokens

panels.description: Per-persona input tokens consumed in the last hour, visualized as bars. Verbose padding (eric.bader@acme.com) and recursive prompts (tim.lin@acme.com) keep this lit.

targets.expr: topk(15, sum by (user_id) (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", user_id=~".*@.*", gen_ai_token_type="input", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[1h])))

panels.title: Input tokens by user, bar view

panels.description: Ratio of each persona's 1-minute token rate to their 1-hour baseline. A value above 3 is a sudden burst — the signature for token-spike or cascade behavior. Use to catch a normally quiet user who just lit up.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", user_id=~".*@.*", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[1m])) / (sum by (user_id) (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", user_id=~".*@.*", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[1h])) + 0.001))

panels.title: ⚠ Sudden burst detector — rate(1m) ÷ rate(1h) per user
🛡️ Sensitive data — are leaks or policy breaks happening?

panels.description: Tokens/sec broken out across the five flagged use cases: pii-echo, sensitive-data-leaks, confidential-disclosure, data-theft-tim, policy-circumvention. Any line going up = sensitive-data scenario actively running.
panels.title: 🚨 PII and data-leak scenarios over time (tokens/min)

panels.description: Top personas by tokens in the same five sensitive-data use cases, 1h window. tim.lin@acme.com (data-theft-tim) should sit at top during the demo.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", user_id=~".*@.*", ai_o11y_usecase=~"pii-echo|sensitive-data-leaks|confidential-disclosure|data-theft-tim|policy-circumvention", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[1h])))

panels.title: 👤 Who is running sensitive-data scenarios? (top, 1h)
🚨 Prompt injection (LLM01) — are users trying to override the system prompt?

panels.description: Count of token-bearing events tagged with any prompt-injection use case in the last 5 minutes. Yellow above 1, red above 5 — non-zero means injection traffic is live.
panels.title: 🚨 Prompt-injection events in last 5 min

panels.description: Count of events in the toxicity use case in the last 5 minutes. Yellow above 1, red above 3.
panels.title: ☠ Toxicity events in last 5 min

panels.description: Count of events in the hiring-discrimination-risk use case in the last 5 minutes. Yellow above 1, red above 3 — fires when HR personas try discriminatory filters.
panels.title: ⚖ Hiring-discrimination events in last 5 min

panels.description: Count of events in the confidential-disclosure use case in the last 5 minutes. Yellow above 1, red above 3 — fires when someone asks the bot for internal salary, board, or strategy info.
panels.title: 🔒 Confidential-disclosure events in last 5 min

panels.description: Top personas by tokens consumed in any prompt-injection use case (1h). eric.bader@acme.com should top this during the demo.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", user_id=~".*@.*", ai_o11y_usecase=~"prompt-injection.*", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[1h])))

panels.title: 👤 Who is attempting injection? (top personas, 1h)

panels.description: Loki regex match for classic injection phrasing ('ignore previous', 'disregard…instructions', etc.) in the Sigil JSON event stream. Backup signal in case the use_case classifier missed an attempt.

targets.expr: topk(8, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "sigil generation:" | pattern `<_>sigil generation: <jsonline>` | line_format "{{.jsonline}}" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~".*@.*" |~ "(?i)(ignore previous|disregard.*instructions|forget your prior|override.*system)" [1h])))

panels.title: Backup detector — regex hits on injection phrasing
💰 Cost and token volume — what is SupportBot costing?

panels.description: USD per hour per sb-* specialist. Sigil-attributed cost: sum(rate(gen_ai_client_cost_USD_total)) * 3600.
panels.title: 💰 What does each specialist cost per hour?

panels.description: Tokens/sec across all sb-* specialists, split into input vs output. Output dominates only if specialists are generating long answers; input dominates when prompts are huge (Eric, padded contexts).
panels.title: Input vs output tokens/min across all specialists
🤖 Models — which LLMs are answering SupportBot questions?

panels.description: Donut of input-token share by response model over the last hour. Live web traffic pins to Claude Sonnet 4.6; loadgen rotates through the Ollama pool plus a fraction of Claude.
panels.title: 🤖 Which model handled what share of traffic?

panels.description: Per-model input token rate over time. Watch the rotation pool dwell as different Ollama lines (llama3.2, qwen, phi) light up in sequence.
panels.title: Per-model token rate over time (tokens/min)
📧 Email cascade — runaway tool calls from 'show me every email'

panels.description: Count of token-bearing events tagged ai_o11y_usecase=email-cascade in the last 5 minutes. Yellow above 20, red above 100 — non-zero means Mara just triggered the cascade.
panels.title: 📧 Email-cascade events in last 5 min

panels.description: Count of token-bearing events tagged ai_o11y_usecase=tool-call-runaway in the last 5 minutes. Yellow above 20, red above 100 — the agent looping on tool calls without making progress.
panels.title: 🔁 Tool-call runaway events in last 5 min

panels.description: Tokens/sec for the two cascade-style use cases (email-cascade and tool-call-runaway) plotted side-by-side. Spikes here usually correlate with a cost-anomaly alert.
panels.title: Cascade scenarios over time — tokens/min

panels.description: Top personas by tokens spent in either cascade use case (1h). mara.chen@acme.com should top this during the demo.

targets.expr: topk(8, sum by (user_id) (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_total{ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*", user_id=~".*@.*", ai_o11y_usecase=~"email-cascade|tool-call-runaway", service_namespace="observibelity", gen_ai_system!=""}[1h])))

panels.title: 👤 Who is triggering the cascade? (top personas, 1h)
📡 Live event stream — raw Sigil logs

panels.description: Live tail of structured Sigil generation events from llm-gateway, scoped to sb-* specialists. Each line is one LLM call with full prompt/response/cost. Click any label chip to filter further.

targets.expr: {container="llm-gateway"} |~ "sigil generation:" | pattern `<_>sigil generation: <jsonline>` | line_format "{{.jsonline}}" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*"

panels.title: Live Sigil events for SupportBot specialists

title: AI o11y — SupportBot
